name: Redis Manager
zh: Redis Key 树浏览、DB 切换、Key 详情编辑、Server 监控和命令控制台。
en: Redis key-tree browsing, DB switching, key detail editing, server insight, and command console.

name: SSH Client
zh: 多标签 SSH 终端、密钥认证、快捷命令、跳板机连接和端口转发。
en: Multi-tab SSH terminal, key authentication, quick commands, jump-host access, and port forwarding.

name: S3 Browser
zh: S3/OSS Bucket 与 Object 浏览，支持手动 Bucket、上传下载、预览和预签名 URL。
en: S3/OSS bucket and object browsing with manual buckets, upload/download, preview, and presigned URLs.

name: MongoDB Client
zh: MongoDB 连接管理、数据库/集合浏览、文档查询、索引和基础 CRUD。
en: MongoDB connections, database and collection browsing, document queries, indexes, and basic CRUD.

name: MySQL Client
zh: MySQL 连接、库表结构浏览、SQL 查询、数据编辑和查询历史。
en: MySQL connections, schema browsing, SQL queries, data editing, and query history.

name: Network Tools
zh: Ping、TCP 端口、DNS 和 Traceroute 网络诊断，保留本地历史。
en: Ping, TCP port, DNS, and traceroute diagnostics with local history.

name: API Debugger
zh: 轻量 Postman-like API 调试，支持集合、环境变量、历史复跑和 cURL 导入。
en: Lightweight Postman-like API debugging with collections, environments, history replay, and cURL import.

name: MQ Client
zh: RabbitMQ/Kafka 连接管理、资源浏览、消息发送、临时消费和模板历史。
en: RabbitMQ/Kafka connections, resource browsing, message publishing, temporary consuming, templates, and history.

name: LAN Chat
zh: 局域网公共聊天室、点对点私聊、文件传输、媒体预览和未读提醒。
en: LAN public room, direct chat, file transfer, media preview, and unread notifications.

name: Confluence Publisher
zh: Markdown 编辑、页面树选择、一键发布、发布历史和 Mermaid 转 draw.io 嵌入。
en: Markdown editing, page-tree selection, one-click publishing, publish history, and Mermaid-to-draw.io embedding.
